test_name: buyer.actions.repo sets director status through the server-owned RPC contract
expected_behavior: Calls request_items_set_status with affected ids and status, with no table fallback

test_name: buyer.actions.repo blocks the legacy direct request_items status fallback
expected_behavior: Throws RPC-required error and does not call supabase.from/update/in

test_name: buyer.status.mutation keeps status propagation happy path inside the status owner
expected_behavior: Mutation succeeds and continues through reject-state cleanup

test_name: buyer.status.mutation fails closed when the server-owned status RPC is unavailable
expected_behavior: Returns failure at set_request_items_director_status and does not clear reject-state

test_name: jobQueue claims jobs through the healthy RPC path without table mutation fallback
expected_behavior: Returns normalized jobs and does not call supabase.from

test_name: jobQueue fails closed when claim RPC signatures are unavailable
scenario: typed and legacy submit_jobs_claim RPCs are unavailable
expected_behavior: Throws RPC-required error and does not select/update submit_jobs

test_name: jobQueue marks completed jobs through the healthy RPC path without cleanup table writes
expected_behavior: Returns after RPC success and does not call supabase.from

test_name: jobQueue fails closed when complete RPC signatures are unavailable
scenario: typed and legacy submit_jobs_mark_completed RPCs are unavailable
expected_behavior: Throws RPC-required error and does not update submit_jobs

test_name: jobQueue marks failed jobs through the healthy RPC path without table mutation fallback
expected_behavior: Returns RPC retry/status result and does not call supabase.from

test_name: jobQueue fails closed when fail RPC signatures are unavailable
scenario: typed and legacy submit_jobs_mark_failed RPCs are unavailable
expected_behavior: Throws RPC-required error and does not read/update submit_jobs
